title: Introducing Lyria 3 Pro
summary: Google DeepMind introduced Lyria 3 Pro, an advanced music generation model that enables creation of custom tracks up to 3 minutes long with enhanced customization and creative control. The tool is being integrated into more Google products following the earlier release of Lyria 3.

What's new with Gemini from Google DeepMind
SynthID, our imperceptible watermark for AI-generated content, is expanding to more partners.
